# @nifrajs/cron — LLM contract card

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-llm-cards.ts. Do not edit by hand — run `bun run gen:cards`. -->

Runtime-agnostic in-process cron for nifra — standard 5-field expressions + @macros, overlap-safe, error-isolated, graceful stop. For long-running servers (Bun/Node/Deno); Workers use the platform scheduled trigger. Dependency-free.

> A tight contract card for AI agents: the exports you actually call + the footguns. For the full
> reference see [`api-reference.md`](../../api-reference.md) (every export + signature) and
> [`llms-full.txt`](../../llms-full.txt) (the prose guides). One cheap read instead of the whole corpus.

## Key exports

- **createScheduler** _(function)_ — `createScheduler: (options?: SchedulerOptions) => Scheduler`
- **matches** _(function)_ — `matches: (fields: CronFields, date: Date) => boolean`
- **nextRun** _(function)_ — `nextRun: (fields: CronFields, from: Date) => Date | null`
- **parseCron** _(function)_ — `parseCron: (expression: string) => CronFields`
- **CronError** _(class)_ — `class CronError`
- **CronFields** _(interface)_ — `interface CronFields`
- **Scheduler** _(interface)_ — `interface Scheduler`
- **SchedulerOptions** _(interface)_ — `interface SchedulerOptions`
- **CronHandler** _(type)_ — `type CronHandler = () => void | Promise<void>`

## Footguns

- In-process and for **long-running servers only** (Bun/Node/Deno). On Cloudflare Workers use the platform **scheduled trigger** — an in-process cron won't fire on a per-request worker.
- Jobs are **overlap-safe** (a still-running job won't re-enter) and error-isolated; call the graceful `stop()` on shutdown so an in-flight job finishes.
